items.title: All construction of Trump's White House ballroom can resume, appeals court says
items.dek: Construction is expected to continue at the White House until the next hearing which is due to take place in June.
items.body: Construction is expected to continue at the White House until the next hearing which is due to take place in June.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Mexico's Sheinbaum denies 'diplomatic crisis' with Spain after conquest row
items.dek: The Mexican president says there were never tension over Spainish colonisation, which had become a thorny issue.
items.body: The Mexican president says there were never tension over Spainish colonisation, which had become a thorny issue.
items.author: IriLine Desk
